description: CompositionPink polo T-shirt made of 87% polyester and 13% spandex, has a collar, short sleeves, buttoned chest placket, nike swoosh embroidered on left chest, brand tab at the hemline and fabric engineered with Dri-Fit technologyFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not dry clean or bleachTumble dry lowCool iron; do not iron on decorationsWhether you're playing tennis or hanging out with your friends, this pink jersey from nike is the perfect choice. Engineered with Nike's Dri-Fit technology, it will wick away sweat to keep you dry and comfortable, on and off the court. Team it with tracks, shorts or jeans and floaters or sports shoes for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of chest 33”
